identity.name: extract-intent
identity.description: Extract Russian intent steps from one session file or summarize tracked file changes

flags.name: --input
flags.description: Path to one JSON or JSONL session file

flags.name: --project
flags.description: Project folder; resolve the latest matching session file before extraction

flags.name: --track
flags.description: Track a JSON, JSONL, or log file against its saved baseline

flags.name: --provider
flags.description: Single source harness provider alias, used with --project

flags.name: --providers
flags.description: Comma-separated providers, used with --project

flags.name: --providers-config
flags.description: Override provider catalog JSON path for --project

flags.name: --format
flags.description: Source format: auto, json, jsonl

flags.name: --track-kind
flags.description: Tracked file kind: auto, json, jsonl, log

flags.name: --track-state-dir
flags.description: Override the directory used for persisted track baselines

flags.name: --reset-track
flags.description: Replace the saved baseline for --track with the current file

flags.name: --ignore-path
flags.description: Comma-separated JSON path prefixes to ignore in --track json mode

flags.name: --ignore-line
flags.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to ignore in --track log/jsonl mode

flags.name: --no-advance
flags.description: Do not move the saved baseline after reporting a tracked diff

flags.name: --processing-provider
flags.description: Single AI provider used for semantic summary, e.g. gemini or pi

flags.name: --max-steps
flags.description: How many intent steps to keep, 3-7

flags.name: --provider-chain
flags.description: Comma-separated provider order or local

flags.name: --state-file
flags.description: Override nx-cognize provider state cache path

flags.name: --preflight-timeout
flags.description: nx-cognize preflight timeout in seconds

flags.name: --runtime-timeout
flags.description: nx-cognize runtime timeout in seconds

flags.name: --pretty
flags.description: Render a human-friendly terminal view instead of JSON

flags.name: --output
flags.description: Output path for JSON or pretty text

flags.name: --version
flags.description: Show tool version

exit_codes.2: Invalid arguments or missing input file
exit_codes.4: Contract violation or invalid nested JSON
